untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit 52-week price extremes (high/low over 252 bars) and implied volatility levels which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires t-statistic significance testing which cannot be expressed in the rule syntax. price_pos_20 (20-day positioning) used as proxy for extremes, but true 52-week anchoring effect detection is not possible. IV compression/expansion inferred from hvol_20 behavior but lacks the precision of true implied volatility data.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction mapped to separate LONG and SHORT entry conditions. Entry conditions approximate 52-week extremes using price_pos_20 (0.1 = near low, 0.9 = near high) combined with hvol_20 compression (0.009 ≈ 0.9 vol points compressed). Exit uses hvol_20 spike (0.0112 ≈ 1.12 vol points expansion) as volatility mean reversion signal. Signal is fundamentally dependent on implied volatility regime which cannot be directly measured from allowed indicators.
